reason: Irreparable mismatch between tests and environment. Tests expect TypeScript build system files (scripts/build/, build.ts, CLAUDE.md) that do not exist in the bun repo at commit a14a89ca953910e896978dfdfb4cdf4c90a151. The gold solution patches CMake files instead of creating the expected TypeScript build system. The test suite is testing for files that cannot exist in this repository state.
